{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231559181DC4939C0ED25051D0BD"}"},"total":9},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7485327647315215166","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这个综漫有咒回，齐神，网王，黑篮，柯南，文野，家教...网王，咒回，柯南，是有单独篇章的。好喜欢这种网王+咒回+柯南的诶。女主是齐木楠雄的妹妹，后来被齐木楠雄及齐木空助发现了穿越者的身份，我感觉这个设定还蛮有意思的诶。女主的术式是数据之眼，可以看到别人的数据，应该和五条的六眼类似。而且后面作者的小脑洞真的很有意思，比如说五条和夏油成为了网球选手（？）
总的来说值得一看
然后作者大大也要加油啊！最好每天五更！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1742818696,"group_id":"7377387280677227545","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"若有时光机，那我一定要回儿时Ally","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9s7bd/cpRkelPmX4OCcp03uOzsV/IlGSeUiZltAAwTL","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/cd3b66c525464e48a2e7e86c23297e49~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789009&x-signature=GxqP0wIkC7KSzbx0lPQgeUPLIpY%3D","user_id":"2467772205902196","user_name":"限量银河˗ˋˏෆˎˊ"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2467772205902196","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7377387280677227545","book_info":{"abstract":"齐木月是个深度的游戏玩家，她热爱一切游戏，但由于身体素质原因只能对3D游戏敬而远之，忽然有一天收到了一个巨型游戏仓并作为特邀玩家参与游戏，不过怎么没有说这个游戏的对面是个真实的世界啊
因为是女主嘛，所以当然箭头摩多摩多
又是一篇综漫，二次元复兴，这一次大概综了网王，齐灾，咒回等等，个人比较喜欢一个一个为主，不会很混乱的综，主打一个来自命运的呼喊，大概是有cp的，但没想好
ps：网王区作者真心立海厨，想要给立海大狠狠加码，不过还是不怎么加比较好，毕竟加码的话新出来角色还要想人设名字绝招，救命，太辛苦了
pps：全文作者自己diy满足快乐
ppps：现在是签约后该简介，真的感觉自己越写越事业，不可以，这可是dokidoki的游戏啊岂可修。一定是国中生的恋爱太有罪恶感，所以就等他们长大一点在看看吧
ppps：一不小心已经到了大学期间，没错，作者的感情线有一种活人微死死人微活的感觉，下一次我绝对要写超绝粗箭头但是无cp的文章
pppps：后期感情线写崩了，泪目
ppppps：不知道多少次的简介修改
pppppps：建议简介允许更多字
ppppppps：文章已完结，不能修改了，大家自己纠错吧！泪","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oca2440e252696eb2a9c09f976fd345fe~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"24k纯金","author_id":"","book_id":"7377387280677227545","book_name":"糟糕，玩游戏的我居然打破了次元","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#404048","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7377387330312946201","read_count":"303","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"441622"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"401","tags":"动漫衍生,二次元,综漫,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oca2440e252696eb2a9c09f976fd345fe~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779436758&x-signature=aWufLdHyA%2BcDMCSua%2FV5ZGHow8g%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2854799933194095","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"486"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231559181DC4939C0ED25051D0BD"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":14,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":11587,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":1987},
